title: Google Remy, Grok 5, Mythos 1, New Atlas Robot, ASI… and More AI News This Month!
summary: A YouTube video summarizing major AI developments including Google's Remy agent, Anthropic's Mythos 1, Grok 5, upgraded Atlas humanoid robot, and DeepSeek price cuts. The host emphasizes that the month's main trend is the rise of AI agents capable of working, coding, adapting, and spreading faster than previously expected.
